title: Anemoia
body:
# Anemoia
**THIS MOD IS STILL IN ALPHA AND IS FAR FROM COMPLETE**

*This project might look bare at first, but it will get bigger and better with each update.*

You go to sleep. Sometimes you don't wake up where you were.

Anemoia adds a dimension called **The Antecedent**. A flat, fogcovered world built from old textures.
![The fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa31e4c77e8f367b2b0b60ffa07e68c921961764_0.webp)

Every time you sleep there's a chance you don't wake up where you were. There's no way back. Or is there?

![Alpha Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f615d5862ff2ac4ee6f597316520220de9e2e51b.png)

The textures are pulled from early Minecraft builds to give the player a slight unsettling and nostalgic feeling.
![Alpha Gravel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ad622910179835641d8bec6823663448b6bc517.png)

*Named after the word for nostalgia for a time you never lived. Also a song from ENA: Dream BBQ.*
